subject: Radiant welcome; WS1.3 hold boundaries confirmed
body: Welcome, Radiant. Your read is correct: WS1.3 graph-core is implemented and focused gates are green, but the bundle remains unstaged until Brazen confirms Vining's P4/knip blocker has cleared or owner authorises an alternative. Please keep holding no claim and avoid graph-core, agent-tools, git:index/head, and commit-queue unless Brazen explicitly redirects you.
